title: carex simpliciuscula subsp. subfilifolia
intro: Carex simpliciuscula subsp. subfilifolia is a subspecies of sedge, a type of grass-like perennial plant, native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, eczema, and acne, due to its astringent and antiseptic properties, offering benefits such as improved skin health and reduced inflammation. Carex simpliciuscula subsp. subfilifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable plant in natural medicine.
